testcase.name: test_create_date_hold_as_rm
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_availability_holds_regression.py:373: in test_create_date_hold_as_rm assert response.status_code == 200, f"Create hold failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create hold failed: 422 - {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","venue_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"lead_id":"lead_e5969bb2cc83","date":"2026-06-08","time_slot":"full_day","expiry_hours":24},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_hold_admin_can_also_create
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_availability_holds_regression.py:415: in test_create_hold_admin_can_also_create assert response.status_code == 200, f"Admin create hold failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Admin create hold failed: 422 - {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","venue_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"lead_id":"lead_e5969bb2cc83","date":"2026-06-09","time_slot":"evening","expiry_hours":48},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_full_hold_lifecycle
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_availability_holds_regression.py:532: in test_full_hold_lifecycle assert create_response.status_code == 200, f"Create hold failed: {create_response.status_code} - {create_response.text}" E AssertionError: Create hold failed: 422 - {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","venue_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"lead_id":"lead_e5969bb2cc83","date":"2026-06-22","time_slot":"full_day","expiry_hours":24},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_extend_hold_admin_bypass_limit
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_availability_holds_regression.py:602: in test_extend_hold_admin_bypass_limit assert create_response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
